steps.title: Check the same line in Desmos
steps.content:
A system has infinitely many solutions when the two equations graph as the same line.

This means the second equation must have the same slope and y-intercept as the given equation $$y = \frac{3}{8}x + 2$$.

Therefore, the slope of the second equation must be $$\frac{3}{8}$$
That confirms C is correct.
